title: Fourier Analysis, Signals, and Time Series · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving signals and temporal demand. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a reproducible signals fourier computational study after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate fourier series in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive fourier transform in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute sampling aliasing in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
